closure: CLOSED-NEGATIVE (g63) — stable=false (DECISIVELY confirmed, Γ imaginary on 2 independent runs), Tc=48K harmonic-mirage-partial, M8 0/3. Binary hydride wall reinforced (group-16, strong-λ-unstable archetype).
